tasks.title: Create Migration for Data Integrity
tasks.description: Implement migration to add foreign keys and indices for data integrity.
tasks.details: Create a migration script to add a foreign key constraint on `followup_enrollments.flow_id` referencing `followup_flows.id` with `ondelete='SET NULL'`. Add a `failure_reason` column to `followup_enrollment_steps`. Create indices for efficient querying.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify the migration applies without errors and the database schema reflects the changes.

tasks.title: Update FollowupEnrollment Models
tasks.description: Update models to reflect new schema changes.
tasks.details: Update `FollowupEnrollmentModel` to include the foreign key and `failure_reason` field. Ensure the ORM mappings are correct.
tasks.testStrategy: Run unit tests to ensure models are correctly mapped and can be queried without errors.

tasks.title: Implement Webhook Handler for Hubla
tasks.description: Update the webhook handler to process `subscription.activated` events.
tasks.details: Modify `purchase_handler.py` to handle `subscription.activated` events. Extract `purchase_id` from `subscription.id` and process each product in `event.products`. Log warnings if no course is found.
tasks.testStrategy: Send mock webhook events and verify that enrollments are created correctly.

tasks.title: Implement Deduplication Logic
tasks.description: Ensure enrollments are not duplicated for the same purchase.
tasks.details: Add a unique constraint on `(account_id, contact_id, flow_id, purchase_id)` in the database. Implement logic in `EnrollContactUseCase` to check for existing enrollments before creating new ones.
tasks.testStrategy: Attempt to create duplicate enrollments and verify that they are not created.

tasks.title: Implement Smart Re-sync for Enrollments
tasks.description: Automatically update enrollments when flow steps change.
tasks.details: Create `ResyncEnrollmentUseCase` to handle changes in flow steps. Detect new, deleted, and modified steps and update enrollments accordingly. Ensure idempotency.
tasks.testStrategy: Modify flow steps and verify that enrollments are updated correctly without duplicating steps.

tasks.title: Add Audit Logging for Re-sync Operations
tasks.description: Log re-sync operations for auditing purposes.
tasks.details: Log each re-sync operation in `audit_events` with details of the flow, enrollments affected, and steps added or cancelled.
tasks.testStrategy: Perform re-sync operations and verify that logs are created with correct details.

tasks.title: Configure AI Memory Settings
tasks.description: Allow configuration of AI memory window in admin settings.
tasks.details: Add `ai_memory_messages` field to `AccountSettings`. Update the admin UI to allow configuration of this setting. Ensure changes are reflected in real-time.
tasks.testStrategy: Change the AI memory setting in the admin panel and verify that it affects the message context size.

tasks.title: Update Message Dispatcher for AI Memory
tasks.description: Use configured AI memory settings in message dispatching.
tasks.details: Modify `MessageDispatcher` to read `ai_memory_messages` from `AccountSettings` and limit the number of messages included in the AI context accordingly.
tasks.testStrategy: Dispatch messages and verify that the correct number of messages are included in the context.

tasks.title: Implement Enrollment Reporting API
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for enrollment reporting.
tasks.details: Develop `GET /admin/followup/enrollments` and `GET /admin/followup/enrollments/{enrollment_id}/steps` endpoints. Implement filtering and pagination.
tasks.testStrategy: Query the endpoints with various filters and verify that the responses are correct and performant.

tasks.title: Add Flow Statistics to API
tasks.description: Enhance flow API to include enrollment statistics.
tasks.details: Update `GET /admin/followup/flows` to return statistics such as `enrollments_active` and `enrollments_completed`.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the API returns correct statistics for flows.

tasks.title: Implement Robust Dispatch Error Handling
tasks.description: Handle dispatch errors gracefully and log failures.
tasks.details: Update `DispatchFollowupStepUseCase` to catch exceptions during dispatch, mark steps as `FAILED`, and log `failure_reason`. Ensure jobs enter DLQ for manual requeue.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate dispatch failures and verify that steps are marked as `FAILED` and logged correctly.

tasks.title: Ensure Atomic Transactions in Enrollment Use Case
tasks.description: Use atomic transactions for enrollment operations.
tasks.details: Wrap the enrollment creation and scheduling in a transaction to ensure all-or-nothing execution. Rollback on failure.
tasks.testStrategy: Induce failures during enrollment creation and verify that no partial enrollments are left.

tasks.title: Enhance UI for AI Memory Configuration
tasks.description: Update admin UI to support AI memory configuration.
tasks.details: Add a numeric input in the admin settings UI for `ai_memory_messages`. Validate input and update settings via API.
tasks.testStrategy: Change the memory setting in the UI and verify that it updates the backend correctly.

tasks.title: Implement Retry Logic for Failed Dispatches
tasks.description: Ensure failed dispatches are retried correctly.
tasks.details: Implement logic to automatically retry failed dispatches by placing them in a DLQ and allowing manual requeue.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that failed dispatches appear in the DLQ and can be retried successfully.

tasks.title: Optimize Database Queries for Reporting
tasks.description: Ensure efficient database queries for reporting endpoints.
tasks.details: Add necessary indices and optimize queries for the reporting endpoints to ensure they meet performance requirements.
tasks.testStrategy: Run performance tests on the reporting endpoints to ensure they meet latency requirements.

tasks.title: Implement UI for Enrollment Reporting
tasks.description: Develop frontend components for enrollment reporting.
tasks.details: Create React components to display enrollment data with filtering and pagination. Integrate with the reporting API.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the UI components to ensure they display data correctly and handle user interactions smoothly.

tasks.title: Develop Unit Tests for Use Cases
tasks.description: Write unit tests for all new use cases.
tasks.details: Develop comprehensive unit tests for `ResyncEnrollmentUseCase`, `EnrollContactUseCase`, and `DispatchFollowupStepUseCase` to cover all scenarios.
tasks.testStrategy: Run unit tests to ensure all use cases function correctly under various conditions.

tasks.title: Conduct Integration Tests for Webhook Processing
tasks.description: Perform end-to-end tests for webhook processing.
tasks.details: Set up integration tests to simulate webhook events and verify the entire processing flow from event reception to enrollment creation.
tasks.testStrategy: Run integration tests to ensure the webhook processing is robust and handles all edge cases.

tasks.title: User Acceptance Testing for New Features
tasks.description: Conduct user testing for all new features.
tasks.details: Coordinate with users to test new features in a staging environment. Gather feedback and make necessary adjustments.
tasks.testStrategy: Monitor user interactions and feedback to ensure features meet user needs and expectations.

tasks.title: Deploy and Monitor New System Features
tasks.description: Deploy new features to production and monitor performance.
tasks.details: Deploy the new system features to production. Set up monitoring to track performance and quickly identify any issues.
tasks.testStrategy: Use monitoring tools to ensure the system is stable and performs as expected after deployment.
